name: postgres
description: Inspect and query a configured Postgres database through MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect and query a configured Postgres database.
interface.longDescription: Inspect and query a configured Postgres database through MCP.

mcpServers.name: Postgres
permissions: Network access to the configured database host
Uses a database connection string as a command argument
Can expose query tools that may read or mutate database data depending on server behavior

tools.name: query
tools.title: Query
tools.description: Run SQL against the configured database.

configFields.label: Connection string
configFields.description: Use a least-privilege database user when possible.

installReview: The connection string is passed to the external process as an argument.
Use read-only database credentials when you only need inspection.
